data.title: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT APPROVAL - SHORT FORM
data.description: Wayland Group Corp along with Scott Langille, Gerhard Müller, Paul Pathak, Eric Silver, Michael Stein, and John Does 1-3, along with Canaccord Genuity Corp. and RF Securities Clearing LP (formerly known as GMP Securities L.P.) are involved in securities class actions. This notice is crucial as it may impact your rights.

data.title: Renesas’ Radiation-Hardened ICs Take Flight on NASA’s Artemis II Crewed Lunar Mission
data.description: Renesas' radiation-hardened integrated circuits are currently being utilized in NASA’s Artemis II mission. The mission, known as Artemis II, recently had a successful launch from the Kennedy Space Center in Florida on April 1. This signifies a significant milestone for Renesas as their technology contributes to the success of this mission in outer space.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Announces Acquisition of a Gold and Silver Stream on the Jervois Project Through a Partnership with KGL Resources
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 1, 2026, Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. announced that its subsidiary, Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd., has finalized a Precious Metals Purchase Agreement. This agreement includes the purchase of gold and involves significant financial transactions. This move is expected to have a positive impact on Wheaton's operations and further establish its position in the precious metals market.

data.title: Abaxx Submits Comments to the National Institute of Standards and Technology on AI Agent Identity Standards
data.description: Abaxx has recently provided feedback to the NIST NCCoE's proposed project regarding AI agent identity standards. The company's comments concentrate on ensuring that agent actions within the financial services sector are both auditable and authorized. This feedback seeks to enhance the transparency and control over AI agents operating in financial services.

data.title: Public Storage Prices 5.000% Senior Notes
data.description: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) revealed that its subsidiary, Public Storage Operating Company ("PSOC"), has successfully priced a public offering of $500 million in fixed-rate senior notes due 2035. The notes, guaranteed by the company, will carry an annual interest rate of 5.000% and will be issued at 99.182% of their par value. They are set to mature on December 15, 2035. The obligations will involve paying interest on the notes.

data.title: FCPT Announces Acquisition of a Left Lane Auto Property for $3.1 Million
data.description: A real estate investment trust known as Four Corners Property Trust (FCPT) has recently acquired a Left Lane Auto property for $3.1 million. This property, located in a robust retail area in Alabama, is newly constructed and operated by the corporate entity. The acquisition includes a long-term, triple net lease agreement spanning 15 years. FCPT focuses on acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties and continues to expand its portfolio with strategic acquisitions like this one.

data.title: JD.com Announces Pricing of CNY10 Billion CNY-denominated Senior Notes
data.description: On April 1, 2026, JD.com, Inc. revealed the pricing details of its offering of CNY10 billion worth of senior unsecured notes in offshore transactions to non-U.S. entities, following Regulation S under the U.S. Securities Act of 1933. The notes were offered in CNY denomination and marked a significant move by the leading supply chain technology and service provider listed on NASDAQ under JD and on HKEX under 9618 (HKD) and 89618 (RMB).

data.title: Mannatech Announces Notification of Late Filing
data.description: In Flower Mound, Texas, on April 1, 2026, Mannatech, Incorporated disclosed that they submitted a Form 12b-25 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission concerning the delayed submission of their annual report on Form 10-K for 2025. This form grants a 15-day extension for filing the 2025 Form 10-K, originally due on March 31, 2026. Mannatech is listed on NASDAQ under ticker symbol MTEX.

data.title: Westport Announces Issuance of Management Cease Trade Order
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 01, 2026, Westport Fuel Systems Inc. ("Westport" or the "Company") revealed that the British Columbia Securities Commission, its main regulator, has enforced a temporary management cease trade order (MCTO) pursuant to National Policy 12-203 – Management Cease Trade Orders ("NP 12-203"). This action was taken against the Company, listed on the TSX under WPRT and on Nasdaq under WPRT, restricting the CEO and CFO from trading in the company’s securities. However, it does not impede other shareholders or investors from trading.
